articles.title: What’s in store for Canada’s 2026 wildfire season?
articles.description: Wildfire season may get off to a relatively quiet start in Canada but lingering drought and a warm summer could tip the scales towards another severe year, experts say. articles.title: Diesel prices could remain high for months — and hit consumers harder than gas costs
articles.description: MONTREAL — High diesel prices continue to ripple through the economy and put pressure on consumers even as a shaky ceasefire in the Middle East offers a hint of relief to global commodities.
